name: Starbucks & Stanleys
description:
This one is for the women who make tournament weekends happen.
Whether you’re playing in the games or supporting your significant other from the sidelines, this one’s for you.
The early mornings, the Starbucks runs, the Stanleys packed with Liquid IV and all-day energy — you’re the real MVP.
From cheering in the stands to showing out on the field, your love, hustle, and support don’t go unnoticed.
This jersey is a tribute to the ones who do it all — and still look good doing it.

name: Shame On Me IE – Pink/Blue
description:
Own the Moment with the Slugger Athletics “IE” Jersey – Shame Never Looked So Good
Turn a lowlight into a highlight with our hilarious and bold “Shame On Me, I Hit an IE” jersey from Slugger Athletics. Inspired by those unforgettable inning-ending moments, this jersey blends humor, self-awareness, and style for the ultimate dugout statement piece.
Featuring a vibrant pink-to-blue gradient, cartoon emojis, "FAIL" stamps, and a big “0” on the back (because… yeah), this jersey brings the comedy to co-ed slow pitch. With phrases like “Big Dreams, Bad Timing,” and “Shame on Me, I Hit an IE,” it’s the perfect gear for the teammate who knows how to laugh at themselves.
Made from breathable, moisture-wicking material, this jersey is as comfortable as it is eye-catching—whether you’re taking the field or taking the L in style. Customize it with your name and number and wear your blunder like a badge of honor.
Because if you’re gonna blow the inning… at least look good doing it.

name: Slugger Athletics Mother’s Day Buy In
description:
Key Features:

Breathable Fabric: Perfect for spring games while celebrating mom
Lightweight Construction: Comfortable for all-day wear at special events
Floral Design: Beautiful pink flowers and teal leaves honor the mothers in our lives
Personalization Available: Add mom’s name and number for a thoughtful touch

Our Mother’s Day jersey isn’t just about looking good—it’s a meaningful way to celebrate the women who support your athletic journey. The carefully chosen fabric wicks away moisture, helping mom stay comfortable whether she’s cheering from the stands or joining in family activities.
This limited-edition jersey proudly displays the Slugger Athletics logo on a backdrop of spring florals. It’s more than just a uniform—it’s a tribute to the mothers who drive us to practice, cheer the loudest, and believe in us even after a strikeout.
Perfect for Mother’s Day games, family photos, or as a heartfelt gift. With this special Slugger Athletics Mother’s Day jersey, you’re not just wearing team colors—you’re honoring the MVP of your life.

name: SA Autism Awareness
description:
Show Your Support in Style with the Slugger Athletics Autism Awareness Jersey!
Celebrate inclusion and awareness with our exclusive Slugger Athletics Autism Awareness Jersey—a perfect blend of meaning and high-performance design. This premium jersey is available in multiple vibrant color options, symbolizing the diversity and uniqueness of the autism community. Featuring bold puzzle piece patterns and eye-catching graphics, this jersey makes a statement both on and off the field.
Crafted with moisture-wicking, breathable fabric, it ensures ultimate comfort during any activity, whether you’re playing sports, working out, or simply spreading awareness in your everyday wear. Plus, with the option to customize your name and number, you can make it uniquely yours!
Support a great cause while repping a standout look. Available now in all sizes—because awareness is for everyone!

name: SA Cosmic Invaders Hoodie
description: Step onto the field in style with the bold and vibrant "Cosmic Invaders" hoodie! Packed with colorful alien characters, graffiti-inspired patterns, and eye-catching UFO designs, this jersey is perfect for a team that’s truly out of this world. The striking neon green accents pop against the sleek black background, while the personalized name and number option on the back lets you showcase your individuality. Made with breathable, moisture-wicking fabric, this jersey keeps you cool and comfortable during every game. Designed for durability, it’s built to handle the intensity of the field and keep you looking fresh season after season. Get ready to invade the competition in this one-of-a-kind design!

name: SA Teal & Black Hoodie
description: Elevate your athletic wear with our signature Slugger Athletics Premium Hoodie. This striking design features a teal and black ombre hoodie creating a dynamic look that stands out. The front showcases our classic Slugger Athletics script logo in crisp white, while the hood interior displays our repeating SA pattern for added style. The kangaroo pocket provides convenient storage, and the ribbed cuffs ensure a secure fit. The back features customizable "PLAYER" text, perfect for team orders or personal preference. Crafted with high-quality moisture-wicking fabric, this hoodie combines style with performance. Available in multiple sizes with durable construction that maintains its shape and color through repeated wear and washing.

name: SA Christmas Hoodie
description: Stay cozy this holiday season with our exclusive "Merry Christmas Ya Filthy Animal" premium hoodie. This festive pullover features the same beloved design as our jersey, reimagined for ultimate comfort. The front showcases the iconic movie scene and holiday message on ultra-soft fabric, complemented by Nordic-inspired patterns and snowflake accents in vibrant red and green. The customizable name and number on the back add a personal touch, while the hoodie’s warm, fleece-lined interior keeps you snug during winter activities. Built with moisture-wicking technology and durable construction, this hoodie maintains its quality through countless washes. Perfect for holiday gatherings, winter workouts, or casual wear. The ribbed cuffs and waistband ensure a secure fit, while the spacious hood adds extra warmth when needed. Available in multiple sizes, this hoodie combines festive spirit with practical comfort for the holiday season.

name: SA Christmas Long Sleeve
description: Celebrate the holidays in style with our exclusive "Merry Christmas Ya Filthy Animal" athletic jersey. This premium performance wear combines nostalgic holiday movie flair with high-quality athletic design. Featuring a vibrant red and green color scheme, the jersey showcases an iconic movie scene on the front along with festive Nordic patterns and snowflake details. The breathable fabric ensures comfort during any activity, while the custom name and number option on the back lets you personalize your look. Perfect for holiday-themed sports events, casual wear, or showing off your Christmas spirit at the gym. Available in multiple sizes with moisture-wicking technology and durable construction that maintains its quality wash after wash.

name: Vice City SA Hat
description:
A Favorite for Professional Athletes!

Our Mid Profile styles are the most popular sporty fit among pro players of sports teams.
The Premium Quality makes them highly sought after.
Structured Firm Front Panel design provides a sturdy and defined shape for a polished look.
Seamed Front Panels with Buckram provide durability and a stable surface for your artwork.
Perforated Sides and Back for enhanced breathability and comfort.
Adjustable Smooth Hook and Loop Closure for easy adjustment and a secure fit.
Pre-Curved Visor for ready-to-wear style.
Gray Undervisor presents a trendy style street look.
Black Cool Comfort Performance Sweatband with Moisture Wicking, Anti-Odor, and Antibacterial functions.

name: Vice City Jersey
description:
Key Features:

Breathable Fabric: Keeps you cool and dry during intense play
Lightweight Construction: Allows for unrestricted movement
Durable Material: Built to withstand the rigors of the game
Team Customization: Add your name and number for a personalized touch

Our jersey isn’t just about looking good—it’s engineered to enhance your performance. The carefully chosen fabric wicks away moisture, helping you stay focused on the game. Its lightweight nature ensures you’re never weighed down, whether up to bat or fielding.
This jersey proudly displays the Slugger Athletics logo. It’s more than just a uniform—it’s a statement of your commitment to the sport. It’s versatile enough for any baseball occasion, perfect for game day or practice.
Experience the perfect blend of tradition and modern performance technology. With this Slugger Athletics jersey, you’re not just wearing team colors—you’re gearing up for success.

name: Freddy Hoodie
description:
Here’s a description for a heavyweight polyester hoodie with similar key features:
Key Features:

Insulating Fabric: Keeps you warm during cooler weather practices and games
Heavyweight Construction: Provides durability and a substantial feel
Moisture-Wicking Material: Helps manage sweat during intense activities
Team Customization: Add your name and number for a personalized touch

Our hoodie isn’t just about staying warm—it’s designed to support your performance in cooler conditions. The carefully selected heavyweight polyester fabric offers excellent insulation while still wicking away moisture, helping you stay comfortable and focused on the game. Its substantial construction ensures durability, standing up to the demands of regular use on and off the field.
This hoodie proudly displays the Slugger Athletics logo. It’s more than just a warm layer—it’s a statement of your dedication to the sport. It’s versatile enough for any baseball occasion, perfect for pre-game warm-ups, post-game cool-downs, or chilly practice sessions.
Experience the ideal combination of classic comfort and modern performance technology. With this Slugger Athletics hoodie, you’re not just wearing team colors but equipping yourself for success in any weather.

name: SA 5 inch Inseam Shorts
description:
Slugger Athletics 5-inch Inseam Shorts
Elevate your athletic performance and style with Slugger Athletics’ cutting-edge 5-inch inseam shorts. Designed for the modern athlete who demands both functionality and fashion, these versatile shorts are your go-to choice for any workout or casual outing.
Unparalleled Comfort and Fit
The 5-inch inseam provides the perfect balance between coverage and freedom of movement. Whether you’re sprinting on the track, lifting weights at the gym, or enjoying a casual day out, these shorts offer unrestricted mobility without sacrificing style.
Vibrant Color Selection
Express your unique personality with our wide range of eye-catching colors:

Classic Black: Timeless and versatile
Royal Blue: Bold and energetic
Cream: Subtle and sophisticated
Hot Pink: Vibrant and attention-grabbing
Multicolor: For those who dare to stand out
Mystery Choice: Embrace surprise with a randomly selected color
And more: Our expanding color palette ensures there’s a perfect shade for everyone

Advanced Fabric Technology
Crafted with state-of-the-art drifit technology, these shorts wick away moisture, keeping you cool and dry even during the most intense workouts. The lightweight fabric feels like a second skin, allowing optimal performance without distractions.
Durability Meets Style
Don’t let the sleek design fool you – these shorts are built to last. The high-quality construction ensures they can withstand the rigors of your toughest training sessions while maintaining their shape and color wash after wash.
Versatility Redefined
These shorts transition seamlessly between activities, from high-intensity interval training to yoga, from running errands to lounging at home. The stylish design makes them equally at home in the gym or streets.
Features at a Glance

5-inch inseam for optimal coverage and movement
Drifit technology for superior moisture management
Lightweight, breathable fabric
Durable construction for long-lasting wear
Available in multiple vibrant colors, including a mystery option for the adventurous
Suitable for various athletic activities and casual wear
Easy care and maintenance

Upgrade your athletic wardrobe with Slugger Athletics 5-inch inseam shorts – where performance meets style. Whether you’re a seasoned athlete or just starting your fitness journey, these shorts are designed to help you look good, feel great, and perform at your best. And for those who love surprises, our mystery color option adds an element of excitement to your purchase!

name: 90’s Snapback
description:
Key Features:

Authentic 90s Design: Mirrors the bold style of our classic 90s jerseys
Slugger Athletics Branding: Prominently embroidered for team pride
Premium Quality: Durable construction for long-lasting wear
Adjustable Snapback: Ensures a comfortable fit for all team members
Flat Brim: Iconic 90s style that’s still fresh today

This snapback is more than just a hat—it’s a crucial part of your Slugger Athletics ensemble. Designed to match our 90s-inspired jerseys perfectly, it brings cohesion to your team’s look from head to toe. Whether on the field, in the dugout, or showing your support in the stands, this hat ties your whole Slugger Athletics outfit together.
Embrace the full 90s Slugger Athletics experience. With this snapback crowning your game-day look, you’re not just wearing team gear—you’re showcasing a complete, coordinated throwback style that celebrates our team’s legacy.
Perfect for players and fans alike, this hat lets everyone know you’re part of the Slugger Athletics family, with a nod to our iconic 90s era.
